reason: Successfully navigated to the Super Agent application, selected the "QA-20260408-184545-vzfx" agent, verified its "idle" status, sent a math question "Hello! What is 2+2?", waited for and received the correct response "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the Super Agent application with sidebar containing three agents including the target agent.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260408-184545-vzfx" agent in the sidebar — Agent was selected and the main view displayed "Start a conversation with QA-20260408-184545-vzfx" with a message input field.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status indicator displayed "idle" (shown as blue dot) in both the sidebar and main view header.

Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully typed into the input field and sent by clicking the send button. The agent status changed to "working" and a new session "Basic Math Question Session" was created.
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response — Agent processing completed in approximately 1 second. The "Working..." indicator disappeared and the agent status returned to "idle".

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — The agent's response displayed the number "4" as a standalone message with "Worked for 1s" notation. Screenshot captured showing both the user's question and the correct response.
